content: agent2: implementing path_transform support in src/jinja2/loaders.py for FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Will touch only that file.

agent2: FYI my /workspace/repo checkout only shows my own path_transform edits — no fallback_searchpath present, so we appear to be in isolated copies (each producing our own patch.txt). No merge needed on my end; proceeding to submit path_transform changes to FileSystemLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader independently.
